businessChallenge.zh: 寵物醫療連鎖需支援多層組織架構（中控總部、連鎖總部、院區），並為後續中控平台、獸醫端產品預留擴展空間。
businessChallenge.en: Pet healthcare franchise needed multi-tier organizational architecture (central HQ, franchise HQ, clinics) with room to expand into admin and vet-facing products.

technicalStrategy.zh: 先定義三層商業架構與資料模型，再預先開發 App 與 Server 基礎設施。採用 Flutter 跨平台 + FastAPI/Express 後端，部署於 Cloud Run，確保各層可獨立演進。
technicalStrategy.en: Defined three-tier business architecture and data model first, then pre-built app and server foundation. Flutter cross-platform + FastAPI/Express backend on Cloud Run, ensuring each tier can evolve independently.

text.zh: 從單一「寵物醫院」概念，規劃三層商業架構（中控總部／連鎖總部／院區）
text.en: Planned three-tier architecture: central HQ, franchise HQ, clinics

text.zh: App 及 Server 預先開發，支援未來多產品線擴展
text.en: Pre-built app and server foundation enabling future product line expansion

text.zh: Cloud Run 部署，TestFlight / Play Console 內測進行中
text.en: Cloud Run deployment; TestFlight / internal testing in progress

lessonsLearned.zh: SaaS 產品的架構設計必須在第一天就考慮多租戶與多層組織，事後重構的成本遠高於前期規劃。
lessonsLearned.en: SaaS architecture must consider multi-tenancy and multi-tier organization from day one — retrofitting costs far exceed upfront planning.

problem.zh: 寵物醫療需支援連鎖經營的多層組織與後續中控、獸醫端產品。
problem.en: Pet healthcare needed multi-tier franchise architecture and future admin/vet products.

solution.zh: 規劃中控總部、連鎖總部、院區三層商業架構，並預先開發 App 及 Server。
solution.en: Planned three-tier business model and pre-built app/server foundation.

text.zh: 從單一「寵物醫院」概念，規劃三層商業架構（中控總部／連鎖總部／院區）
text.en: Planned three-tier architecture: central HQ, franchise HQ, clinics
